Table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT

Card of table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT

Name

MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT

Code

MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT

---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data:

DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_INTERACTION_PRODUCT

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

SELECT

p.country_refcode AS COUNTRY_CODE,

p.identity_unique_identifier AS IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK,

p.interaction_id AS INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK,

p.products_product_id AS PRODUCT_IDENTIFIER_BK,

p.products_product_name AS PRODUCT_NAME,

TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(p.date_time) AS INTERACTION_DATETIME,

CASE

WHEN INTERACTION_DATETIME IS NOT NULL

AND (p.dup_cnt = 1 OR p.rn_by_load_ts = 1)

THEN INTERACTION_DATETIME

ELSE p.__load_ts

END AS VALID_FROM

-- [VALID_TO]

-- [ACTIVE_FLAG]

FROM (

SELECT

p.*,

COUNT(*) OVER (

PARTITION BY p.identity_unique_identifier, p.interaction_id, p.products_product_id, p.date_time

) AS dup_cnt,

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

PARTITION BY p.identity_unique_identifier, p.interaction_id, p.products_product_id, p.date_time

ORDER BY p.__load_ts ASC

) AS rn_by_load_ts

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_INTERACTION_PRODUCT p WHERE TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(p.date_time) <= p.__LOAD_TS OR TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(p.date_time) IS NULL

) p;

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: identity_unique_identifier, interaction_id, products_product_id

Primary key(s) Target: IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK, INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK, PRODUCT_IDENTIFIER_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

PII data

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level.

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2

 

----------

RLS

----------

RLS v2 add RDE_BRIDGE_CONSUMER_RLS to sharing script

 

SELECT p.*

FROM MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT p

JOIN MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER c

ON c.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK = p.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK

AND p.VALID_FROM >= c.VALID_FROM

AND p.VALID_FROM < c.VALID_TO

WHERE

c.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

OR p.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES);

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_INTERACTION


Check constraint name of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT

CKT_MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_P


Server validation rule of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT

%RULES%


Code preview of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT

drop table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT
--==============================================================
create or replace table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT (
IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
PRODUCT_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE TEXT,
PRODUCT_NAME TEXT,
INTERACTION_DATETIME DATE,
VALID_FROM DATE not null,
VALID_TO DATE not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG BOOLEAN not null,
constraint PK_MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PR primary key (IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK, INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK, PRODUCT_IDENTIFIER_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT set comment = 'The Interaction Product table records information about the specific assets or products associated with a consumer’s interaction. By linking interactions to the related assets, this table supports analysis of product usage, asset involvement in service or commercial activities, and market-level product performance.';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Unique original identifier of the user (identity_unique_identifier)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT.INTERACTION_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Unique ID of the interaction. Reference data: Action_ID (interaction_id)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Identifier of the assets related with the interaction (derived; can be used as Product Code available in TD-based PBI dataflows) (products_product_id)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT.COUNTRY_CODE is
'2 letters ISO country code; Reference Data: Country (country_refcode)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_NAME is
'Description of the assets related with the interaction (products_product_name)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT.INTERACTION_DATETIME is
'Timestamp of the interaction date (date_time)';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is Active ';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT.VALID_TO is
'It indicates till when the record is Active ';

comment on column MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the record is active ';

Column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT

VALID_FROM: Indicates when record validity begins, based on the business timestamp (DATE_TIME). If duplicates exist, the technical load timestamp (__load_ts) is used to resolve them.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_FROM of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT

Column VALID_TO of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT

VALID_TO: Indicates the datetime till when the record was valid based on the business timestamp (DATE_TIME). If duplicates exist, the technical load timestamp (__load_ts) is used to resolve them. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table MDE_CONSUMER_INTERACTION_PRODUCT
